email_segmentation.system: <your system prompt for extracting the sender's new message content from a raw Gmail body>

email_thread_summary.system: <your system prompt for summarizing a full email thread into latest_updates, next_steps, tone, parties, and suggested_thread_label JSON; must handle {summary_routing_aliases}>
email_thread_summary.user: <your user prompt; must include {summary_datetime}, {calendar_timezone}, {calendar_events_block}, and {thread_messages} placeholders>

email_thread_summary_incremental.system: <your system prompt for merging new messages into an existing thread summary JSON; must handle {summary_routing_aliases}>
email_thread_summary_incremental.user: <your user prompt; must include {summary_datetime}, {prior_summary_json}, {new_thread_messages}, {calendar_timezone}, and {calendar_events_block} placeholders>

email_reply_voice.system: <your system prompt for drafting a reply in the user's voice; output reply_body, rationale, open_questions JSON>
email_reply_voice.user: <your user prompt; must include {n_messages}, {thread_subject}, {response_intent}, and {thread_messages} placeholders>

image_description.system: <your system prompt for describing an image from email; output description and visible_text JSON>

person_summary.system: <your system prompt for producing a person-level summary across threads; must include {person_name}; output summary, highlights, current_priorities, waiting_on_others, tone_overview JSON>
person_summary.user: <your user prompt; must include {summary_datetime} and {thread_summaries} placeholders>

meeting_prep.system: <your system prompt for generating meeting prep from matched email thread; output prep_summary, talking_points, open_loops, suggested_opener, open_questions JSON>
meeting_prep.user: <your user prompt; must include {meeting_title}, {meeting_start}, {meeting_end}, {meeting_location}, {meeting_attendees}, {thread_label}, and {thread_messages} placeholders>

prompts.thread_message_block: <template string for rendering one message block; must include {index}, {datetime}, {sender}, {recipients}, {subject}, {content} placeholders>
prompts.thread_summary_block: <template string for rendering one thread summary block; must include {index}, {label}, {status}, {tone}, {last_sender}, {latest_updates_block}, {next_steps_block} placeholders>
prompts.lane_thread_summary_block: <template string for rendering one lane thread summary block; must include {index}, {label}, {datetime}, {status}, {tone}, {last_sender}, {latest_updates_block}, {next_steps_block} placeholders>
